essence: Installs, operates, maintains, and repairs mechanical equipment across industrial and engineering environments.

identity.title: Mechanical Technician
identity.summary: Performs hands‑on mechanical work including installation, troubleshooting, maintenance, and repair of machinery, supporting smooth and safe industrial operations.

salary.notes: Technicians specialising in automation, hydraulics, pneumatics, or high‑risk industrial environments can exceed £55k-£70k+.

qualifications: Training in mechanical engineering, industrial maintenance, or machinery operations
Knowledge of mechanical systems, components, and industrial equipment
Ability to diagnose faults and perform repairs safely
Understanding of preventive maintenance and mechanical diagnostics

lifestyle.description: Mechanical technicians work in factories, utilities, engineering firms, and industrial plants. They install machinery, troubleshoot mechanical issues, perform repairs, and support maintenance teams. The role suits individuals who enjoy hands‑on mechanical work, problem‑solving, and keeping equipment running reliably.

habits: Diagnoses mechanical faults and performs repairs
Uses mechanical tools and diagnostic equipment
